name: @lythaeon-sof/sdk
description: TypeScript SDK for Node.js Solana observer apps on SOF

scripts.clean: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); rmSync('dist-test', { recursive: true, force: true }); rmSync('dist-examples', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.format: biome format --config-path biome.json --write src examples scripts tsdown.config.ts
scripts.format:check: biome format --config-path biome.json src examples scripts tsdown.config.ts
scripts.lint: oxlint --config .oxlintrc.json --tsconfig tsconfig.lint.json --type-aware --deny-warnings --report-unused-disable-directives src tsdown.config.ts && oxlint --config .oxlintrc.json --deny-warnings --report-unused-disable-directives examples scripts
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint --config .oxlintrc.json --tsconfig tsconfig.lint.json --type-aware --fix --fix-suggestions src tsdown.config.ts && oxlint --config .oxlintrc.json --fix --fix-suggestions examples scripts
scripts.check:examples: pnpm run build:examples && node dist-examples/runtime-config-balanced.js && node dist-examples/runtime-config-parse.js && node dist-examples/app-entrypoint.js && node dist-examples/app-config.js
scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run check:examples && pnpm run check:package && pnpm run check:release-metadata
scripts.test: pnpm run build && pnpm run build:test && node --test dist-test/*.test.js dist-test/**/*.test.js
